description_long: This humanoid figure has a muscular, hairless body with an elongated, featureless head and a pronounced jawline. Its skin is a pale, fleshy tone, and it is dressed in camouflage-patterned pants that are cropped at the calves. Two crossed bandoliers loaded with large-caliber ammunition drape over its bare chest and back, forming an X-shape. The figure wields two oversized, futuristic firearms, one in each hand, and its feet are bird-like with three prominent toes. The overall appearance is menacing and militaristic, blending human and alien characteristics with combat-ready accessories.
description: A muscular, bald humanoid with an elongated head, wearing camo pants, crossed bandoliers, and wielding two large guns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's bare chest, crossed bandoliers, both guns, and bird-like feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated head profile, muscular arm, and the side of the camo pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the X-shaped bandoliers across the back and the back of the camo pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, gun, and the side profile of the head and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style cropped pants with crossed ammunition bandoliers
